scope: wave2 fan-out migration: the 4 legacy-parity read streams only; the full Plausible API surface (goals API, funnels, realtime visitors, custom events breakdown for every property dimension, CSV exports, site provisioning/management) is out of scope until Pass B

excluded.reason: /v1/stats/realtime/visitors is a reporting/analytics/query surface with endpoint-specific parameters; this bundle does not declare a stable collection schema and fixture for it
/v1/stats/goal/breakdown is a reporting/analytics/query surface with endpoint-specific parameters; this bundle does not declare a stable collection schema and fixture for it
/v1/sites is a mutation endpoint; this bundle has no reviewed write record schema, approval risk, or legacy write contract for that operation
/v1/sites is a destructive/admin mutation and is not exposed as a reverse-ETL action in this bundle
